subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Sacred Threshold! Thy letter was received. Thou hadst written that gradually thou wouldst become accustomed to the work [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس نامه شما رسید مرقوم نموده بودید رفته رفته بکار معتاد خواهم
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
